title: Overview Workspace Layout Controls and User Presets

layout_presets_added.behavior: Default balanced layout with command center visible, left panel collapsed, right Intelligence panel visible, and map central.
Hides command center and both side panels so the SceneView takes maximum space while floating restore controls remain visible.
Keeps the command center compact, left panel collapsed, right Intelligence panel wide, and parcel search emphasized.
Opens the layer controls and keeps countywide intelligence visible without turning every layer on.
Shows Model Lab controls on the left and Model Lab Intelligence on the right. Overlay behavior remains off by default unless already enabled.
Shows the Snapshot Helper and Snapshot Capture context so the real Save Snapshot action stays explicit.
Keeps a compact command center, collapsed layers, right panel visible, and report actions easy to reach.

panel_visibility_controls.left_panel: Layout menu can hide/show the Layers panel, and Map Focus hides it with a Show Layers restore button.
panel_visibility_controls.right_panel: Layout menu can hide/show the Intelligence panel, and Map Focus hides it with a Show Intelligence restore button.
panel_visibility_controls.command_center: Layout menu can compact, expand, or hide the command center. A Show Command Center restore button appears when hidden.
panel_visibility_controls.reset_layout: Reset Layout restores the Command Center preset.
panel_visibility_controls.save_layout: Save Layout writes the current layout preference to the cfs.overview.layout.v1 localStorage preference.

panel_sizing_behavior.map_protection: The shell uses fixed width buckets and grid minmax constraints so panels cannot drag or preset the map out of view.

localStorage_persistence.normalization: Stored preferences are validated before use and fall back to the Command Center preset when invalid or missing.

restore_controls.behavior: Floating controls appear when panels or the command center are hidden.

workflow_preservation.search_parcel: Search Parcel still activates parcel mode, focuses the search input, and keeps Selected Parcel Intelligence available.
workflow_preservation.explore_countywide: Explore Countywide still activates countywide mode and opens layer controls.
workflow_preservation.model_lab: Model Lab still activates Model Lab mode, shows Model Lab controls and Intelligence, and keeps unsafe probability/score fields out of the UI.
workflow_preservation.snapshot_builder: Snapshot Builder still opens snapshot mode without creating a snapshot. The explicit Save Snapshot action remains inside the helper/right panel.
workflow_preservation.planning_snapshot: No report data model changes were made; snapshots continue to capture planning context, not UI panel positions.

validation_results.python_compileall_app: top-level app directory is not present; command reports cannot list app

smoke_test_results.map_focus_preset: passed; command center and panels hide, map remains visible, restore controls appear
smoke_test_results.reset_layout: passed; command center returns and restore clutter disappears
smoke_test_results.model_lab_mode: passed; controls and Intelligence panel show with no unsafe probability/raw score wording
smoke_test_results.snapshot_builder_mode: passed; explicit Save Snapshot action remains visible and top command does not save
smoke_test_results.search_parcel_focus: passed; Search Parcel focuses the aria-label Search parcels input
smoke_test_results.browser_console: only known ArcGIS draped graphics label-placement warnings observed

remaining_limitations: The in-app browser read-only evaluation context did not expose localStorage directly, so persistence was verified through UI behavior and automated source/test coverage rather than direct browser storage inspection.
Layout preferences store panel arrangement only; Planning Snapshot reports intentionally do not include panel positions or command-center UI clutter.
